name: Chico Bon Bon: Monkey with a Tool Belt
original_name: Chico Bon Bon: Monkey with a Tool Belt
overview: Armed with tools and engineering smarts, monkey mechanic Chico Bon Bon and his Fix-It Force help the people of Blunderburg solve all of their problems.
